channel.title: [Archive] Dom, Meg & Randell Catchup Podcast - The Edge
channel.itunes:subtitle: The Edge Breakfast with Dom, Meg and Randell [archive]
channel.description: Catchup with The Edge Breakfast with Dom, Meg and Randell: All the best bits every week with podcast exclusive content and some extra fun stuff when it comes up. [archive]
channel.itunes:summary: Catchup with The Edge Breakfast with Dom, Meg and Randell: All the best bits every week with podcast exclusive content and some extra fun stuff when it comes up. [archive]
channel.itunes:author: The Edge

image.title: Dom, Meg & Randell Catchup Podcast - The Edge [archive]

item.title: Full Show Catchup - Tuesday 27 July 2021
item.itunes:title: Full Show Catchup - Tuesday 27 July 2021
item.description:
Fun show today!! We chat to Kiwi Olympic medalist Hayden Wilde and Meg hits up Randell's mum about something she got up to over the weekend...
See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.title: Full Show Catchup - Monday 26 July 2021
item.itunes:title: Full Show Catchup - Monday 26 July 2021
item.description:
We made #1 in a Buzzfeed article of the worst interviews of all time, Kiwi singer Benee is on the show, we start a new game called the "No-Lympics" and someone stole stuff from Randell's house during our mid-winter Christmas party
See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.content:encoded:
We made #1 in a Buzzfeed article of the worst interviews of all time, Kiwi singer Benee is on the show, we start a new game called the "No-Lympics" and someone stole stuff from Randell's house during our mid-winter Christmas party

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:summary:
We made #1 in a Buzzfeed article of the worst interviews of all time, Kiwi singer Benee is on the show, we start a new game called the "No-Lympics" and someone stole stuff from Randell's house during our mid-winter Christmas party
See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: rova | The Edge

item.title: DMR Only Fans - Tuesday 20 July 2021
item.itunes:title: DMR Only Fans - Tuesday 20 July 2021
item.description:
The guys chat about their experiences giving birth (Dom and Randell's only go as far as inhaling heaps of laughing gas hahaha) and Dom thinks he might have offended Steph from our day show...
See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

The guys chat about their experiences giving birth (Dom and Randell's only go as far as inhaling heaps of laughing gas hahaha) and Dom thinks he might have offended Steph from our day show...

item.title: Full Show Catchup - Friday 16 July 2021
item.itunes:title: Full Show Catchup - Friday 16 July 2021
item.description:
Real fun show today! We chat the most adventurous place you've had sex, get all the best parts from this week in the Producer's Diary, and Dom goes H.A.M on Talkback!
See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.title: Full Show Catchup - Wednesday 14 July 2021
item.itunes:title: Full Show Catchup - Wednesday 14 July 2021
item.description:
On today's podcast we chat to someone who paid nearly $300k to go to space... and is STILL waiting to go!! Dom has a legit disease and Pass the Mic is real good today!
See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.title: Full Show Catchup - Friday 9 July 2021
item.itunes:title: Full Show Catchup - Friday 9 July 2021
item.description:
We chat about poor old Intern Cal's parents going to flat viewings for him (How did your parents make it clear they wanted you to move out??) and what's the tiny thing your mates will NEVER let you live down?
See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.content:encoded:
We chat about poor old Intern Cal's parents going to flat viewings for him (How did your parents make it clear they wanted you to move out??) and what's the tiny thing your mates will NEVER let you live down?

item.title: DMR Only Fans - Friday 9 July 2021
item.itunes:title: DMR Only Fans - Friday 9 July 2021
item.description:
You might have heard us do 'Pass the Mic', where we lowkey just roast eachother, and in this ep we can flipping it and doing a compliment version?

item.itunes:title: Full Show Catchup - Thursday 8 July 2021
item.description:
MEG'S BACK!! It's a fun podcast this one - We have an intervention for Dom, Domfessions is suuuper juicy this week and we've got a special edition of Pass the Mic for Meg...

item.title: Full Show Catchup - Wednesday 7 July 2021
item.itunes:title: Full Show Catchup - Wednesday 7 July 2021
item.description:
How long do you reckon you could survive locked in a freezer? Our Producer Phippsy gives it a go, Pass the Mic is back and you'll crack up when you hear how many VHS tapes a guy in our office STILL owns...
See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Full Show Catchup - Friday 2 July 2021
item.itunes:title: Full Show Catchup - Friday 2 July 2021
item.description:
It's a big one! We've got Kiwi rapper Kings in studio to decide once and for all who's got the best rap game, What's the worst lie you've ever told? And catch up on any stuff you've missed in the producer's diary!
See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.content:encoded:
It's a big one! We've got Kiwi rapper Kings in studio to decide once and for all who's got the best rap game, What's the worst lie you've ever told? And catch up on any stuff you've missed in the producer's diary!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:summary:
It's a big one! We've got Kiwi rapper Kings in studio to decide once and for all who's got the best rap game, What's the worst lie you've ever told? And catch up on any stuff you've missed in the producer's diary!
See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: rova | The Edge

item.title: DMR Only Fans - Thursday 1 July 2021
item.itunes:title: DMR Only Fans - Thursday 1 July 2021
item.description:
Adele isn't even a computer, Dr Dre isn't even a doctor... We try to keep it going...
See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.title: Full Show Catchup - Thursday 1 July 2021
item.itunes:title: Full Show Catchup - Thursday 1 July 2021
item.description:
Listener Angela has a story in Domefessions which might be one of the most shocking we've had, Randell had a bad time trying to control his kids and we practice our raps for our Ed Sheeran song!
See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.content:encoded:
